g : S →+* T
f : R →+* S
⊢ ∀ (x y : R), g (f (x + y)) = g (f x) + g (f y)

intro x y
    have h : (f (x + y) : S) = (f x) + (f y) := by
      simpa using f.map_add x y
    have h₁ : (g (f (x + y)) : T) = (g ((f x) + (f y))) := by
      rw [h]
    have h₂ : (g ((f x) + (f y))) = (g (f x)) + (g (f y)) := by
      have h₃ : (g ((f x) + (f y))) = (g (f x)) + (g (f y)) := by
        simpa using g.map_add (f x) (f y)
      exact h₃
    calc
      (g (f (x + y)) : T) = (g ((f x) + (f y))) := by rw [h₁]
      _ = (g (f x)) + (g (f y)) := by rw [h₂]

have h : ∀ (x y : R), g (f (x + y)) = g (f x) + g (f y) := by
      intro x y
      have h₁ : f (x + y) = f x + f y := by
        apply f.map_add
      have h₂ : g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := by rw [h₁]
      have h₃ : g (f x + f y) = g (f x) + g (f y) := by

intro x y
    have h₁ : f (x + y) = f x + f y := by
      apply f.map_add
    have h₂ : g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := by
      rw [h₁]
    have h₃ : g (f x + f y) = g (f x) + g (f y) := by
      apply g.map_add
    calc
      (g ∘ f) (x + y) = g (f (x + y)) := rfl
      _ = g (f x + f y) := by rw [h₁]
      _ = g (f x) + g (f y) := by rw [h₃]
      _ = (g ∘ f) x + (g ∘ f) y := by
        simp [Function.comp_apply]
        <;> ring
        <;> simp_all [RingHom.map_add]
        <;> ring

      have h₄ : g (f (x + y)) = g (f x) + g (f y) := by
